demographics.living_situation: lives at home; currently unable to walk on the affected leg

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My left ankle and the top of my foot suddenly ballooned up a few hours ago, the pain is agonising, and I can't even put weight on it. I'm really scared it's a bone infection or a blood clot.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on really fast this evening and it's so painful I can't stand on it — I want to know if I need to go to hospital tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: a few hours ago, came on very quickly this evening
symptom_narrative.duration: about 4 hours and still getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: swollen, very stiff, and a deep severe pain in the top of the foot and the ankle
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonising — the worst it's been, I can't put any weight on it at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the top of my left foot and my left ankle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started this evening
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — I haven't taken any painkillers tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to stand or put any weight on it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I don't think I've had a fever or the shakes, and I didn't injure it or twist it
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had short bouts of joints swelling up in my hands and feet before that came and went on their own, but never this bad or this sudden
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't walk on it — I've been hopping around the house, and I'm worried about falling

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a mild inflammatory arthritis a doctor mentioned a while back — I was told my blood tests were positive for it
past_medical_history.how_managed: nothing regular — the flare-ups usually settle by themselves

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home tonight; can't put weight on the foot so getting around by hopping, and nervous about slipping or falling

objective_data_offered.value: the top of my left foot and ankle look puffy and swollen with a bit of redness over it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-described / on-camera appearance only — not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: can't bear weight on the left foot, hopping to move around
haven't measured my temperature but I don't feel feverish and I haven't had shaking chills
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-impression only; no thermometer reading taken
